anchor.note: local sprite-space contact point at the holder's base ring; handle projects right (cols 10-12) beyond the anchor column, by design.

review_notes: Podstakannik (openwork metal glass holder) with faceted glass filled with tea: amber_2/amber_1/amber_0 liquid bands + cream_3 surface glint, soot_3/soot_2 metal cradle with a C-loop handle to the right so the silhouette reads clean. v001 first pass widened the frame from 12 to 13px after an 8x check showed the handle clipping off-canvas. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x. No HISTORICAL_LEDGER entry yet — flag for historian pass (dated catalog/photo of podstakannik style).
